stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
According to the extract from the route information page generated by a flight planning tool, which statement is correct regarding the difference between the ground distance and air distance for the flights EASA23 and EASA4 performed by the same aircraft type, on the same day?

options.a: The difference between ground distance and air distance is greater for the longer flight because it has a longer flight time.
options.b: Flight EASA23 has a longer flight time; therefore, ground speed and true airspeed vary more.
options.c: The flight planning tool is malfunctioning because the difference between ground distance and air distance should be the same for both flights, as they experience the same wind component.
options.d: The longer the flight duration, the smaller the difference between ground distance and air distance.
